interpretation: These are different scopes or snapshots. They must not be added, compared as rates, or presented as one corpus until a Mac mini export with cutoff, query, and hash is attached.
publication_rule: Only 34,424 is used for the v7 internal discovery chart; 69,905 is labeled as user-reported and 49,345 as all-domain local count. Neither is a market-size estimate.
